terms.definition: Gross Payment Variance — total invoiced payment variance for original (non-adjusted) lines. Represents Cotiviti's gross identified savings before adjustments.
Net Payment Variance — net savings after adjustments (GPV + adjustments). NPV = orig_pv + adj_pv. This is the final net savings.
NPV Rate — NPV as percentage of paid (non-bypassed). Formula: SUM(npv) * 100.0 / SUM(paid). Also called yield or savings rate.
Adjustment Payment Variance Rate — adjustments as percentage of GPV. Formula: SUM(adjustments) / SUM(gpv). Measures appeal/overturn rate.
Average paid per non-bypassed line. Formula: SUM(paid) / SUM(non_bypassed_lines). Used to measure price trends per service.
Number of edited (hit) lines per 1000 non-bypassed lines. Formula: SUM(edited_lines) * 1000 / SUM(non_bypassed_lines). Measures rule engine effectiveness.
Utilization metric: distinct claims per 1000 distinct members. Requires COUNT PART data. Formula: SUM(claim_count) * 1000 / SUM(member_count). Must match level_of_detail to GROUP BY dimensions.

Controls which aggregation granularity to use for claim/member counts. The table has pre-aggregated counts at 24 period-based LODs organized as a pyramid: Overall Trends (period/period_lob/period_lob_prod) → Geographical (period_state/period_lob_state/period_lob_prod_state) → Drill Down (add betos/icd/pos/spec) → Key Drivers (deepest: cpt/icd/pos/spec within betos). NULL means SUM PART (financial data). Member counts only at 4 levels: period, period_lob, period_state, period_lob_state.

HEALTHCARE_PHASE2_PPI is a UNION of SUM PART (financial metrics, level_of_detail IS NULL) and COUNT PART (claim/member counts, level_of_detail has a value). Never mix them in one query without understanding which rows to use.
A payer+LOB+product_type combination that has been continuously active (non-zero GPV ≥90% of months) for the entire 36-month reporting window. Use same_store=1 for consistent YoY trend analysis.
Restructured BETOS Classification System (RBCS). Categorizes CPT/HCPCS codes into categories (E/M, Surgeries, Imaging, etc.), subcategories (52), and families (180).

Claims identified as behavioral health via multiple criteria: BETOS subcategory='Behavioral Health Services', OR ICD code starts with F, OR BH specialty, OR POS 52/53/57. Use behavioral_health_indicator=1 for financial, behavioral_health_indicator_cm='1' for counts.
Segments rolling 12-month windows: P = most recent, P_lag1 = prior year, P_lag2 = 2 years ago. Use for YoY comparison. Each period spans exactly 12 months.
Bypassed lines are excluded from rule processing (no GPV/NPV). paid = non-bypassed paid, bypass_spends = bypassed paid, total_received_spends = both. GPV/NPV/adjustments only apply to non-bypassed.
Payment Policy Management — Cotiviti's primary rule engine for detecting overpayments based on payment policies (CMS, AMA, custom).
Coding Validation — Cotiviti's coding review engine that identifies improper coding (unbundling, upcoding, etc.).
Claim Pattern Review — identifies unusual claim patterns. Same underlying logic as FWA but branded differently for non-Aetna clients.
Fraud Waste & Abuse — Aetna-specific claims review solution. Same logic as CPR but branded as FWA for Aetna clients.
default_indicator_cm = '1' means the count row represents ALL claims (not subsetted to BH/telehealth/medical_drugs). Use as the denominator for claims per 1000 members calculations.

Level of Service — maps E&M CPT codes to complexity levels 1-5. Higher LOS = more complex/expensive visit. Only populated for E&M codes, NULL otherwise. LOS is CATEGORICAL — never average it. For LOS trend analysis, calculate % share of non_bypassed_lines at each LOS level over time (GROUP BY period_indicator, los). This shows the shift in service complexity distribution.

For Behavioral Health, duration of service refers to psychotherapy session length, NOT the LOS (Level of Service) column. Duration is derived from CPT codes: 30 Minutes = CPT 90832, 90833 (short-duration psychotherapy). 45 Minutes = CPT 90834, 90836 (standard psychotherapy). 60 Minutes = CPT 90837, 90838 (extended psychotherapy). NEVER use the 'los' column for duration of service — 'los' is a coding complexity level (1-5), not time.

When a user asks for 'Payment Integrity trends' or 'PI trends' for a customer, provide a composite view of THREE metrics over time: (1) GPV% = SUM(gpv) * 100 / SUM(paid), (2) NPV% = SUM(npv) * 100 / SUM(paid), (3) Utilization = claims per 1000 members (at period level). All three should be shown per period_label. This is the standard Payment Integrity health check view.
